message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync-conformance 0.2.5 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

Brings the conformance tooling up to the v0.3.0 release. frankenlibc
uses asupersync-conformance as an optional build-tooling dep for its
conformance harness; the new release adds golden snapshots, fuzz
targets, and metamorphic tests that this harness can now consume.

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync-conformance = "0.2.5"` → `"0.3.0"` at
  [workspace.dependencies]. All workspace consumers using
  `asupersync-conformance = { workspace = true }` resolve through this
  bump.
- crates/frankenlibc_conformance/Cargo.toml: direct-dep bump
  `{ package = "asupersync-conformance", version = "0.2.5", optional = true }`
  → `version = "0.3.0"`.
